brand.name: El Punto Autoservices
brand.address: C/ Americo Lugo 198A, Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic

rules: No Inter, Roboto, or generic sans-serif for headings.
Headings must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter).
Overlines/Labels must be Uppercase, Tiny, and Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Use clamp() or fluid scaling for H1 up to text-5xl/text-6xl max.
Do not exceed text-6xl for hero headings.
Never use pure #000000. Use the tinted black (#0A0A0A or #111111).
Accent color (#E10600) is reserved for performance-driven interactions like CTAs, hover states, and active highlights. Do not overuse.
Hover state color must be a lighter/brighter hue of the active state color.
Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding: p-6, p-8, p-12, p-16, p-24, p-32.
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: Mode A: Tetris Grid for Marketing/Services. Asymmetry creates tension. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 with varied row/col spans (e.g., col-span-8, col-span-4).
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Always start grid-cols-1 on mobile. Left-align dense content. Optical alignment over mathematical alignment.
layout_and_spacing.container_borders: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).

surfaces.headers: Crystal Glass variant. bg-black/60 with backdrop-blur-xl and delicate 1px inner stroke (border-white/10).
surfaces.dashboard_cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and border color brightens.
surfaces.tracing_beam: Use glowing gradient lines tracing borders for high-conversion sections (like Booking or Pricing).

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. It is mandatory for the premium feel.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must have clear hover and focus states.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-up entrances for bento grid items using framer-motion.

components_strategy.marketing_sections: ALWAYS use pure HTML + Tailwind CSS. Do not use Shadcn Card components for creative layouts.
components_strategy.interactive_logic: ALWAYS use Shadcn for Booking Forms, Select, Calendar, Tabs, and Admin Dashboard logic. Heavily customize them to match the dark luxury aesthetic (strip Vercel look).
components_strategy.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react for high-end app feel (Duotone weight for marketing, Regular for dense UI).

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid="call-now-button").

hero.description: Hyper-realistic luxury sports car in a high-end, clean dark workshop with red LED accents. Use as full-bleed hero background with bg-black/50 overlay.

service_diagnostics.description: Mechanic holding a glowing diagnostic tablet next to a car engine. Use in Services or About section.

about_workshop.description: Professional high-end automotive workshop at night. Use as background for 'Why Choose Us' or 'About Us'.

gallery.description: Red car on lift in dark lighting
White luxury car in dark setting
White Mercedes Benz coupe in premium workshop

brand_logos_fallback.instructions: Use SVG icons for car brands (Toyota, Honda, Nissan, Ford, Chevrolet) from libraries like 'react-icons/si' (Simple Icons) or use text-based luxury typography for brands if SVGs are not perfectly matched. Alternatively, use standard text styling with high contrast.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'framer-motion' and 'lenis' for smooth scrolling.
Use raw HTML/Tailwind for the landing page grid and bento layouts.
Use Shadcn components solely for the Booking Form, Calendar, and the Admin Panel.
Implement bilingual support (ES/EN) using a context provider or i18n library.
Ensure 'data-testid' is added to all buttons, links, form inputs, and language toggles.
Ensure the hero image has a dark gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-black/80 via-black/40 to-transparent) so text is highly legible.
